# Pull Request Summary

## What does this PR do?
Briefly describe what was changed and why.

- What feature, fix, or improvement does this implement?
- Which module or guided lab does this relate to?

---

## Related Module / Lab
Select one:

- Module 2 – Environment Setup & Baseline
- Module 3 – Tasks & Execution Control
- Module 4 – Timing, Timers & Watchdogs
- Module 5 – Synchronization & Resource Sharing
- Module 6 – Inter-Task Communication
- Module 7 – Event-Driven Design
- Module 8 – Integration & Stabilization
- Module 9 – Final Project

---

## How to Build and Run
Provide brief instructions so reviewers can verify your changes.

Example:
1. Build the project
2. Run the executable
3. Observe console output

---

## Evidence of Correct Behavior
Describe or attach evidence that demonstrates the system behaves as expected.

Examples:
- Console output or logs
- Screenshots
- Timing measurements
- Notes on observed behavior

---

## Checklist (Confirm Before Requesting Review)

- [ ] Code builds without errors
- [ ] System runs and produces expected output
- [ ] Previously working functionality is not broken
- [ ] Changes align with the guided lab requirements
- [ ] Evidence is included or described

---

## Additional Notes
(Optional) Anything else reviewers should know.
